channel.title: Portrait on really.lol
channel.description: Recent content in Portrait on really.lol

item.title: My grandad holding my mom. It's very jarring to see him in a wheelchair with parts of his body removed. It's clearly a frustration to him when he's such a practical, hands-on guy
item.description: This is a photo post, which means you aren't going to be able to see it in the RSS feed. I haven't worked out how to reliably show images in the RSS feed, so you'll have to go the website itself. Sorry! I promise this isn't a growth hack! I'm just bad at this!
